message:
feat(browser): add auth detection rules and Playwright flows for Claude Code and Gemini

Detect CLI authentication prompts from Claude Code and Gemini so wa can
automatically recognize when an agent session needs login/OAuth.

New detection rules:
- claude_code.auth.login_required: matches "open this URL" login prompts
- gemini.auth.oauth_required: matches "authorize this app" OAuth prompts

Browser automation (Playwright-based):
- anthropic_auth.rs: Anthropic/Claude Code browser login flow (974 lines)
- google_auth.rs: Google/Gemini OAuth authorization flow (1030 lines)

Corpus test fixtures (8 files):
- Positive and near-miss negative fixtures for both auth patterns
- Ensures rules match real prompts and reject similar-but-different text

builtin.json: 4 new test cases for the two auth detection rules

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+To sign in, open this URL in your browser: https://console.anthropic.com/login

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+Sign in successful. Welcome to Claude Code.

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+Go to the following link in your browser to authorize this app:
+https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth?client_id=123456.apps.googleusercontent.com&scope=openid+email

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+Authorization complete. You are now authenticated with Google.

@@ -365,5 +365,29 @@
     "text": "pane exited",
     "expected_rule_ids": [],
     "negative_for": "wezterm.pane.exited"
+  },
+  {
+    "name": "claude_code_auth_login_required_positive",
+    "text": "To sign in, open this URL in your browser: https://console.anthropic.com/login",
+    "expected_rule_ids": ["claude_code.auth.login_required"],
+    "expected_extracted": {}
+  },
+  {
+    "name": "claude_code_auth_login_required_negative",
+    "text": "Sign in successful. Welcome to Claude Code.",
+    "expected_rule_ids": [],
+    "negative_for": "claude_code.auth.login_required"
+  },
+  {
+    "name": "gemini_auth_oauth_required_positive",
+    "text": "Go to the following link in your browser to authorize this app: https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth?client_id=xxx",
+    "expected_rule_ids": ["gemini.auth.oauth_required"],
+    "expected_extracted": {}
+  },
+  {
+    "name": "gemini_auth_oauth_required_negative",
+    "text": "Authorization successful. You are now signed in with Google.",
+    "expected_rule_ids": [],
+    "negative_for": "gemini.auth.oauth_required"
   }
 ]
